title: Savory Flaky Vietnamese Dried White Corn Crumble
description: A romantic and savory dish featuring slow-cooked dried white corn crumbles that are perfect for breakfast or a light meal.
instructions: Soak dried white corn in water for at least 4 hours or overnight. Drain and pat dry with paper towels.
In a large saucepan, heat butter over medium heat. Add salt, pepper, garlic powder, and onion powder (if using). Stir well.
Add soaked dried white corn to the pan and toss gently until evenly coated in the spice mixture.
Transfer corn to a baking dish or oven-safe container. Bake for 30-45 minutes, stirring occasionally, until golden brown and crispy.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
